task_description: Migrate all Azure AI services (OpenAI, Translator, Computer Vision OCR, Text Analytics) to Google Gemini via Vertex AI using the @google/genai SDK with vertexai:true mode. Use gemini-2.0-flash model for all calls (cheapest, highest rate limits). Preserve all existing functionality, Pro/Free tier gating, fallback logic, and API response shapes.

verification.summary: tsc --noEmit passes cleanly. npm run build succeeds. All 7 API routes migrated to Gemini. Review v1 found 7 issues, all fixed. Review v2 approved with 2 non-blocking observations (single-text translation fallback exposing raw model text, ai-advisor weaker injection boundary due to multi-turn constraints).
